key_notes: 3-pass streaming, RM in/out, in-kernel tilize/untilize, persistent scalar CBs

description: Identity passthrough: reader reads RM sticks, compute tilizes c0->c1 then untilizes c1->c17, writer writes RM sticks to DRAM

approach: TensorAccessor RM stick reads, single pass per tile-row, reserve Wt pages, read 32 sticks, push Wt pages
tilize c0->c1 then untilize c1->c17, single pass per block, InitAndUninit WaitBlock mode
TensorAccessor RM stick writes, wait Wt pages from c17, write 32 sticks per block to DRAM

description: Pass 1: tilize input, reduce SUM along row with 1/W scaler to compute row-wise mean. Output is tile-aligned column vector.

approach: Added prepare_reduce_scaler(1/W) into c2 at startup for mean computation
tilize c0->c1, reduce SUM REDUCE_ROW c1+c2->c24 (mean col vector), untilize 1-tile-wide c24->c17

change: output_shape changed to list(shape[:-1]) + [32] for reduced column vector output
reason: Stage 2 outputs 1-tile-wide mean col vector, test expects reduced shape

change: writer stick_size now uses output_tensor shape instead of input shape
reason: output tensor is now 1-tile wide (W=32), writer needs output_stick_size=64 not input stick_size

details: TypeError: ttnn.Shape does not support slice indexing [:-1]. Need to convert to list first.

description: ttnn.Shape only supports int indexing, not slicing. Need list(input_tensor.shape)[:-1] + [32]
evidence: TypeError: __getitem__ incompatible function arguments, slice not supported

change: Convert ttnn.Shape to list via explicit indexing loop instead of slice, then build output_shape

details: max diff 0.57, output appears to be raw tile col0 data not row means. reduce may not be computing correctly.

description: reduce<SUM> might produce sum not mean. Need to verify scaler is applied. Check if prepare_reduce_scaler pushes to CB correctly, or if PoolType::SUM ignores custom scaler.
evidence: output looks like raw col0 data, not averaged values

approach: Added DPRINT TSLICE to inspect reduce output in c24 before untilize

description: fp32_dest_acc_en=True may cause partial tile packing issue in reduce output. Output shows valid values in some rows and zeros in others, matching fp32 face layout mismatch. Try with fp32_dest_acc_en=False.
evidence: 8 non-zero rows then 8 zeros then 5 non-zero then 11 zeros pattern

change: Set fp32_dest_acc_en=False to test if fp32 accumulation causes partial tile packing in reduce output

approach: Removed DPRINT debug code, testing with fp32_dest_acc_en=False

design_deviations: fp32_dest_acc_en disabled due to reduce output tile packing issue

description: 2-pass: Pass1 computes mean (reduce_sum_row with 1/W scaler). Pass2 re-tilizes input and subtracts mean (COL broadcast). Output is centered x.

approach: Changed num_passes from 1 to 2 for 2-pass streaming (pass1=mean, pass2=subtract)
2-pass: pass1 tilize+reduce_mean->c24, pass2 tilize+sub(c1,c24 COL bcast)->c16, pop c24, untilize c16->c17

change: Restored output_shape to same as input (full width)
reason: Stage 3 outputs full-width centered data, not reduced column vector

cb_summary: P1: c0:Wt/Wt c1:Wt/Wt c24:1/persist. P2: c0:Wt/Wt c1:Wt/Wt c24:NoWaitNoPop+manual_pop c16:Wt/Wt c17:Wt/Wt

description: 2-pass: Pass1 mean, Pass2 sub_mean+square+reduce_var+add_eps+rsqrt. Output rsqrt(var+eps) column vector.

approach: Pass2 now does sub_mean->square->reduce_var->add_eps+rsqrt. Output rsqrt(var+eps) via untilize of 1 tile from c_27. Epsilon CB c_3 used with NoWaitNoPop (reader generates once at start).
Added epsilon_u32 as compile-time arg at index 1, shifted TensorAccessorArgs to index 2. Generate epsilon tile into c_3 via prepare_reduce_scaler at program start.

change: Added epsilon_u32 as reader compile-time arg at index 1, shifting TensorAccessorArgs to index 2. Added struct import for float-to-uint32 packing.
reason: Reader needs epsilon value to generate epsilon tile in c_3 for add_eps+rsqrt phase.

change: Output shape changed to column vector: list(shape[:-1]) + [32]
reason: Stage 4 outputs rsqrt(var+eps) column vector, not full-width tensor.

approach: Fixed epsilon CB policy from NoWaitNoPop to WaitUpfrontNoPop for correct first-use synchronization.

summary: All CBs balanced. c_0: reader pushes Wt x2, compute tilize consumes Wt x2. c_1: reused for tilize output and square output. c_2: persistent scaler. c_3: persistent epsilon (WaitUpfrontNoPop). c_24: reduce push 1, sub NoWaitNoPop, manual pop. c_25: sub push Wt, square consume Wt. c_26: reduce push 1, add consume 1. c_27: add+rsqrt push 1, untilize consume 1. c_17: untilize push 1, writer consume 1 (Wt=1 for output W=32).

description: Full 3-pass layer norm: Pass1 mean, Pass2 var+rsqrt, Pass3 normalize with optional gamma/beta.

approach: Full 3-pass: Pass1 mean, Pass2 var+rsqrt (c_24 persists to pass3), Pass3 sub_mean+mul_rsqrt with compile-time branching for gamma/beta combinations. 4 paths: no_gamma_no_beta->c_16, gamma_only->c_28*gamma->c_16, gamma+beta->c_28*gamma->c_16+beta->c_28, beta_only->c_28+beta->c_16.
Changed num_passes from 2 to 3 for full 3-pass streaming.

change: Reverted output shape from column vector back to full input shape
reason: Stage 5 outputs full normalized tensor, not a reduced column vector.

summary: All CBs balanced for 3-pass no-gamma-no-beta path. c_0: Wt x3 passes. c_24: persists pass1->pass3 with manual pop. c_27: persists pass2->pass3 with manual pop. c_16: mul output Wt tiles -> untilize. c_17: Wt tiles -> writer.
